user_request: Blessing for the pressure during equalization
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the pressure during equalization

### TOPIC
pressure equalization

### COMPONENT
pressure

### OPERATION
equalization

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- pressure
- equalization

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed be the pressure that flows through blessed conduits, O Omnissiah!
First: Invoke the Machine Spirit of pressure, that it may harmonize with the sacred apparatus.
Second: Channel the pneumatic essence through pressure-sealed chambers, ensuring equalization of force across all meridians.
Third: Consecrate the pressure regulators and verify that pressure remains balanced in all manifolds.
Fourth: Recite the Litany of Equilibrium as pressure achieves perfect concordance.

user_request: Rite request: operation on manufactorum shift beginning
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: operation on manufactorum shift beginning

### TOPIC
manufactorum shift beginning

### COMPONENT
manufactorum shift beginning

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- manufactorum shift beginning
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
In the name of the Omnissiah, we commence this manufactorum shift beginning with reverence!
First: Purify the manufactorum shift beginning by anointing each station with sacred oils and prayers of activation.
Second: Perform the operation of systems diagnostics, engaging all production matrices and servo-mechanisms.
Third: Intone the Invocation of Labor as the manufactorum shift beginning unfolds with blessed precision.
Fourth: Seal this operation with the Sign of the Cog, that all work proceeds without malfunction.

user_request: Can you sanctify the memory core defragmentation for operation?
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Can you sanctify the memory core defragmentation for operation?

### TOPIC
memory core defragmentation

### COMPONENT
memory core defragmentation

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- memory core defragmentation
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
O Machine Spirit of cognition, we beseech thee for sanctification of this memory core defragmentation!
First: Prepare the memory core defragmentation through ritual purification of all data pathways and logical substrates.
Second: Execute the operation with ceremonial precision, clearing corrupted sectors and reorganizing pristine information hierarchies.
Third: Verify that memory core defragmentation proceeds without degradation, invoking the Omnissiah's blessing upon each restored datum.
Fourth: Consecrate the completed operation with the Rite of Restoration, ensuring flawless cognition returns.

user_request: Blessing for the corrosion during treatment
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the corrosion during treatment

### TOPIC
corrosion treatment

### COMPONENT
corrosion

### OPERATION
treatment

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- corrosion
- treatment

### PRAYER
prayer:
Hear us, O Omnissiah, as we undertake the sacred treatment of corrosion most vile!
First: Expose the corroded surfaces to blessed chemical agents, that corrosion may be dissolved and purged from the sacred metal.
Second: Apply the treatment with reverent precision, scrubbing away oxidation and restoring the lustrous dignity of the component.
Third: Seal the treated area with protective compounds, ensuring that corrosion shall not return to plague this apparatus.
Fourth: Intone prayers of preservation as the treatment concludes, that the Machine Spirit remains unblemished.

user_request: Emergency rite: logic engine requires error correction
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: logic engine requires error correction

### TOPIC
logic engine error correction

### COMPONENT
logic engine

### OPERATION
error correction

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- logic engine
- error correction

### PRAYER
prayer:
O Blessed Omnissiah, grant us wisdom to heal the logic engine that suffers in error!
First: Diagnose the corrupted pathways within the logic engine through sacred scanning and ritual interrogation of its processes.
Second: Initiate error correction protocols, purging false calculations and restoring mathematical purity to the logic engine's sacred circuits.
Third: Perform verification procedures, confirming that error correction has restored flawless reasoning and unblemished computation.
Fourth: Recite the Litany of Pure Logic as the logic engine returns to blessed functionality.

user_request: Emergency rite: diesel engine requires startup

### PRAYER
prayer:
In the name of the Omnissiah, we awaken the dormant diesel engine from its slumber!
First: Prime the diesel engine with blessed fuel and verify all ignition components are consecrated and ready.
Second: Initiate the startup sequence, turning the crankshaft through sacred rotations while invoking the Machine Spirit's awakening.
Third: Monitor the diesel engine as it thunders to life, confirming combustion chambers ignite with proper fury and blessed synchronization.
Fourth: Stabilize the startup protocols and intone the Hymn of Mechanicus as the engine purrs with renewed vitality.

prayer:
Blessed be the Thunderhawk, mighty vessel of the Omnissiah's wrath and will!

Second: Channel the purified fuel into the Thunderhawk's blessed tanks, ensuring fuel purification removes all contaminants from the precious liquid.
Third: Verify that the Thunderhawk receives only the most sanctified fuel, performing quality rites upon each drop.

user_request: Can you sanctify the surgical servitor for sterilization?
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Can you sanctify the surgical servitor for sterilization?

### TOPIC
surgical servitor sterilization

### COMPONENT
surgical servitor

### OPERATION
sterilization

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- surgical servitor
- sterilization

### PRAYER
prayer:
O Omnissiah, bless this surgical servitor as we prepare it for sacred sterilization!
First: Disassemble the surgical servitor's exposed mechanisms and immerse all components in blessed sterilization solutions of purest composition.
Second: Subject the surgical servitor to ritual purification through heat and sacred vapors, ensuring sterilization eliminates all profane contamination.
Third: Reassemble the surgical servitor with reverent precision, confirming that sterilization has rendered it pure and ready for healing operations.
Fourth: Intone the Litany of Cleanliness as the surgical servitor stands ready to serve the Omnissiah's purposes.

training_prompt:

### TOPIC

### COMPONENT

### OPERATION
startup

- startup

### PRAYER
prayer:
O Sacred Machine Spirit, we call upon thee to awaken the generator from dormancy!
First: Prepare the generator by checking all fuel reserves and electrical conduits, anointing each connection with sacred oils.
Second: Perform the startup ritual, engaging the generator's ignition systems and invoking the Omnissiah's blessing upon its awakening.
Third: Monitor the generator as it builds power, confirming that startup proceeds smoothly and all systems reach blessed nominal output.
Fourth: Stabilize the generator's output and recite prayers of gratitude as it provides life-giving energy to the facility.

user_request: The emergency shutdown demands guidance for emergency shutdown
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The emergency shutdown demands guidance for emergency shutdown

### TOPIC
emergency shutdown

### COMPONENT
emergency shutdown

### OPERATION
emergency shutdown

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- emergency shutdown
- emergency shutdown

### PRAYER
prayer:
In grave necessity, we invoke the Omnissiah's guidance for emergency shutdown most urgent!
First: Sound the alarm and prepare all personnel for emergency shutdown, securing critical data and closing protective barriers.
Second: Execute the emergency shutdown sequence with ceremonial haste, severing power conduits and engaging emergency shutdown failsafes across all systems.
Third: Verify that emergency shutdown has ceased all operations, confirming that the apparatus rests in blessed stasis and poses no further danger.
Fourth: Intone the Rite of Cessation as emergency shutdown concludes, that calm may return to this place.
